{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323034455AEFBA2A0A828BFAFD937"}"},"total":1387},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7573773729605370648","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"爽！爽！这是真的爽！
看了这么久的书了，剧情虽然不是最好的，但绝对是最爽的那几本
仙草说不上，但算得上灵草吧
因为这本书看的真的很爽，热血沸腾，毫不夸张[已种草][已种草][已种草][已种草][已种草][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][书架加一][书架加一][书架加一][书架加一][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763413667,"group_id":"7509711594117418008","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我一定要写一本自己喜欢的书","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2nXnj5QH2tobExW0pZdVDm4dO+fPWS6Ms5JusM7M8Gv","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5b01fdc403ed4263b1746cf68dd12e3a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789693&x-signature=2h6BjaNWCSg33LK0PgODEDJxElo%3D","user_id":"2758052028359966","user_name":"棱镜门六花"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2758052028359966","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7509711594117418008","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+召唤+皇帝+无敌+霸道+杀伐果断】
穿越玄幻世界，李太苍成为了皇帝与前皇后的儿子。
身份敏感的他不得不深居简出，低调行事。
然而，他的父皇临终前却将传国玉玺传给了他。
霎时间，当今皇后叶后，他的兄弟们，世家宗门全都将目光看向了他。
他最好的下场就是被圈禁至死。
却不料，就在此时，他觉醒了诸天征伐系统！
开局获得百年修为，并且召唤不良帅袁天罡！
从此，他开始陆续召唤诸葛亮、张良、韩信、项羽、霍去病、岳飞……
一夜之间，他从最废物的皇子成为了最强大的皇子！
袁天罡：“不良人愿为陛下效死！”
诸葛亮：“亮愿为陛下效犬马之劳。”
张良：“陛下不必多虑，我有一计……”
韩信：“陛下给臣多少兵，臣就给陛下打多大的疆土。”
霍去病：“陛下，草原狼族未灭，何以家为？”
岳飞：“壮志饥餐胡虏肉……霍将军，你怎么把异族全杀了！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a43ebe137f647cf996292d39cd3dce9d","author":"冰棠胡卢","author_id":"","book_id":"7509711594117418008","book_name":"召唤诸天，废皇子令人族再次伟大","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7509718738237669913","read_count":"86110","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1702734"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"718","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,无敌,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/18a37f011f97913e6f6db70854137458~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779392695&x-signature=%2F9OjFOOlXUPuZFoL5jyOvxchKdE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1917159994569864","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"48"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323034455AEFBA2A0A828BFAFD937"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5465,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8727,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":13179},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601916932334240537","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看，虽然是系统无敌文，但也带些权谋，最重要的是剧情不会让人看的疲劳，有些无敌小说看剧情感觉越看越像复制粘贴一样，但这本我看的很舒服，有让我继续看下去的兴趣。比起一些系统无敌文的千篇一律，这本也比较能让我代入进去，看的进去。会有些细节让人生感。开新地图的时候不会让我觉得崩战力，反正我觉得这本不该只有7.3，五星值得"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769960984,"group_id":"7509711594117418008","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2ygBQXzoHuGL2J8QB0E9VCY4Vm6tEg13rYeJb83OoBD","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/44d2c8068e5f49519a1b4a823473d43c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790627&x-signature=EW00hDVrsEr4m05lPs4e%2B7nTqWw%3D","user_id":"3887503268131175","user_name":"阿苏啊·"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3887503268131175","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7509711594117418008","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+召唤+皇帝+无敌+霸道+杀伐果断】
穿越玄幻世界，李太苍成为了皇帝与前皇后的儿子。
身份敏感的他不得不深居简出，低调行事。
然而，他的父皇临终前却将传国玉玺传给了他。
霎时间，当今皇后叶后，他的兄弟们，世家宗门全都将目光看向了他。
他最好的下场就是被圈禁至死。
却不料，就在此时，他觉醒了诸天征伐系统！
开局获得百年修为，并且召唤不良帅袁天罡！
从此，他开始陆续召唤诸葛亮、张良、韩信、项羽、霍去病、岳飞……
一夜之间，他从最废物的皇子成为了最强大的皇子！

诸葛亮：“亮愿为陛下效犬马之劳。”
张良：“陛下不必多虑，我有一计……”
韩信：“陛下给臣多少兵，臣就给陛下打多大的疆土。”
霍去病：“陛下，草原狼族未灭，何以家为？”
